children.heading: Provisions relating to construction work, liability for damage, etc., on Mississippi River; notice to lessees
children.label: a Provisions relating to construction work, liability for damage, etc., on Mississippi River; notice to lessees

children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall alter or affect in any way the provisions of .section 702c of title 33

The Secretary shall provide notice of the provisions of and this chapter to all existing and prospective lessees of lands leased by the United States and within the Colorado River Floodway.section 702c of title 33

children.heading: National Flood Insurance Act and National Flood Insurance Program; continuation
children.label: b National Flood Insurance Act and National Flood Insurance Program; continuation
children.text: Except as otherwise specifically provided in this chapter, all provisions of the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968, as amended [ et seq.], and requirements of the National Flood Insurance Program (“NFIP”) shall continue in full force and effect within areas wholly or partially within the Colorado River Floodway. Any maps or other information required to be prepared by this chapter shall be used to the maximum extent practicable to support implementation of the NFIP.42 U.S.C. 4001

children.heading: National Flood Insurance Act provisions relating directly to Floodway; notice to communities affected
children.label: c National Flood Insurance Act provisions relating directly to Floodway; notice to communities affected
children.text: The Secretary shall publish notice on three successive occasions in newspapers of general circulation in communities affected by the provisions of .section 4029 of title 42
